_readme: Config for vault_tokenizer.py. Vault and token store paths come from vault_config.json.

_notes.min_score: Presidio confidence threshold. Lower = more detections but more false positives. 0.6 is a good starting point.
_notes.pii_types: Presidio entity types to detect and tokenize. AMOUNT is handled via custom regex, not Presidio.
_notes.supported_extensions: Only these file types are processed. PDFs: pdfplumber extracts text from digital PDFs; easyocr handles scanned PDFs (requires easyocr + pypdfium2 packages — install if needed).
